'''Seatroopers''' were [[stormtrooper]]s in the [[Stormtrooper Corps]] of the [[Galactic Empire]] that specialized in [[Water|aquatic]] environments. They were equipped with various aquatic equipment including scuba backpacks, [[Water|underwater]] propulsion jets, and flippers. Seatroopers saw action on the planet [[Mon Cala]] in [[18 BBY]]. Other seatroopers were also stationed on the planet [[Lothal]].

==Equipment==
Like standard stormtroopers, they wore [[Color|white]] [[armor]].<ref name="RitR" /> They were also equipped with breathing tubes that were attached to a scuba backpack to their [[helmet]]s and had underwater propulsion jets on their backs. They utilized fins on their boots and were equipped with [[DC-12U beam rifle]]s and used [[One Man Submersible Devilfish|OMS Devilfish subs]].<ref name="Dark Lord 15" />

==History==
[[File:SoloSwims-HanImperialCadet2.png|thumb|left|275px|Cadets at the Imperial Naval Academy on Carida also trained as seatroopers.]]
In [[18 BBY]], seatroopers participated in the aftermath of the [[Battle of Dac City|Battle]] of [[Dac City]] on [[Mon Cala]] after all surface [[City|cities]] were destroyed along with Imperial forces.<ref name="Dark Lord 15" /> While the [[Carida Academy|Imperial Naval Academy]] of [[Carida]] primarily trained [[Imperial Starfighter Pilot]]s, [[Imperial cadet]]s also trained for other Imperial units including Seatroopers. On one occasion, [[Han Solo]] and his fellow cadets trained in an underwater exercise donning Seatrooper armor.<ref name="Imperial Cadet 2" />

At one point, a few [[Standard year|years]] prior to the [[Battle of Yavin]], seatroopers on [[Lothal]] stood by during an aquatic training exercise for [[Imperial cadet]]s.<ref name="RitR" /> During a [[Skirmish on Madurs|skirmish]] in the days after the [[Battle of Endor]], stormtroopers on the ice moon [[Madurs]] donned underwater armor and engaged [[underground resistance network|insurgent fighters]] in the freezing seas around the [[black tower]]. Their armor was sleek and white but did not protect against an [[edont]] [[Taming beasts|summoned]] by [[Princess]] [[Leia Skywalker Organa Solo|Leia Organa]].<ref name="The Princess and the Scoundrel" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Seatroopers_Iskalon_Effect.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The original seatroopers as depicted in ''Star Wars 74: The Iskalon Effect'']]
Seatroopers first reappeared in [[canon]] in [[Jason Fry]]'s [[2015]] junior novel ''[[Servants of the Empire: Rebel in the Ranks]]''.<ref name="RitR" /> The seatrooper was first pictured in [[Darth Vader (2017) 15|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 15]], a [[2018]] comic authored by [[Charles Soule]] and penciled by [[Giuseppe Camuncoli]].<ref name="Dark Lord 15" />

Seatroopers originally appeared in the [[1983]] [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] [[Marvel Comics|comic issue]] [[Star Wars (1977) 74|''Star Wars'' (1977) 74]].<ref name="The Iskalon Effect">[[Star Wars (1977) 74|''Star Wars'' (1977) 74]]</ref>
